title: Tampere Heavy Rain
lead: Tampere is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.74. This anomaly is expected to have significant impacts on the city.
body:
The current weather conditions in Tampere are characterized by heavy rain, with an accumulation of 14.1 GG, and a humidity level of 90%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 15.1 km/h, which may exacerbate the impacts of the heavy rain. 
 The CDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heat-related stress, but the HDD is significant, at 14.1 GG, which may lead to increased energy consumption.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the impacts of the heavy rain event in Tampere.
